concerns.text: Tasks T033–T037 (Topological Visualization & Human Narrative) introduce a new scope (knot invariants, 3D trajectories, narrative metaphors) that is not present in spec.md (FR-001 to FR-007) or plan.md. This constitutes a silent relaxation of the project's defined boundaries and a violation of the 'No silent constitution drift' principle, as the tasks implement unapproved features without a corresponding FR/SC in the spec.

Task T013a hardcodes specific API endpoints ('https://www.lmfdb.org/api/zeros/') and mandates a pipeline halt if unreachable. Spec FR-002 only requires ingestion from 'a verified source (LMFDB or Odlyzko)' without mandating specific endpoints. This task silently weakens the flexibility required by the spec and risks violating Constitution Principle II (Verified Accuracy) by failing on valid but differently-structured sources not explicitly listed in the task.

Task T028 fixes the sensitivity analysis window sizes to exactly {10^5, 10^6, 10^7}. Spec FR-006 and SC-002 require a 'set of varying magnitudes' but do not define these specific values. By hard-coding these values, the task silently narrows the acceptance criteria, potentially failing to satisfy the 'robustness' requirement if these specific scales are insufficient, violating the 'No dropped acceptance criteria' principle.

Task T012 combines gap generation and normalization (log^2 p) into a single streaming step. Spec FR-003 defines normalization as a distinct requirement, and Spec Edge Cases imply raw data preservation. This task silently relaxes the 'Data Hygiene' constraint (Constitution Principle III) by potentially overwriting or failing to preserve raw gap data in a separate file, making re-normalization impossible without re-running the sieve.
